description:
Model a 40m x 40m agricultural field and install a south-facing solar array using Skelion, designed for 'agrivoltaics' (crops grown underneath).

Expected Actions:
1. Draw a 40m x 40m rectangle on the ground plane (Z=0) to represent the crop field.
2. Use Skelion to generate a solar array on this face with the following parameters:
   - Tilt: 20 degrees
   - Azimuth: 180 degrees (South)
   - Pitch (Row spacing): 8000 mm (8 meters - wide spacing for light).
3. Elevate the panels: Modify the model so the lowest point of the solar panels is at least 3 meters (3000 mm) above the ground (Z >= 3000mm). The 40x40m ground plane must remain at Z=0.
4. Select all the solar panel components and group them. Name the group instance 'Agrivoltaic_System'.
5. Save the model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\agrivoltaics_design.skp'.
